title: Pack N Trade 16 Inch Round Cake Boards – Pack of 5 Double Thick 4mm Cardboard, Foil-Finished Both Sides, Reusable & Sturdy Cake Base for Baking, Decorating, and Display
features: 【Premium Double Thickness】Crafted with 4mm thick premium cake board round, these boards provide a sturdy base for all cake types, ensuring stability during transport and display.
【Elegant Foil Finish】Featuring a foil finish on both sides, these cake cards boards add a touch of sophistication to your cake presentations while offering moisture resistance.
【Reusable & Durable】Designed for multiple uses, these boards maintain their shape and appearance, making them a cost-effective choice for both home bakers and professionals.
【Perfect Size for Versatility】Measuring 16 inches, these round boards are ideal for various cake sizes and styles, from single-layer to multi-tiered creations.
【Enhances Cake Presentation】The sleek design and sturdy construction not only support your cakes but also enhance their overall presentation, making them stand out on Christmas & any occasion.
description: Elevate your cake presentations with Pack N Trade 16 Inch Round Cake Boards. Each board is constructed from double-thick 4mm premium cardboard, providing a reliable and sturdy base for your cakes. The foil finish on both sides adds an elegant touch while offering resistance to moisture and grease, ensuring your creations remain pristine. Designed for reusability, these boards maintain their shape and appearance even after multiple uses, making them a cost-effective solution for both amateur and professional bakers. The 16 inch round size offers versatility, accommodating a range of cake sizes and styles. Whether you're baking for a Christmas, birthday, wedding, or any special occasion, these boards not only provide the necessary support but also enhance the visual appeal of your cakes. Choose Pack N Trade for quality and elegance in every bake.
